items.claim: Mitch Ramirez is a bottom-level fighter used by the UFC to boost other fighters' records.
items.quote: Mitch just represents that bottom level... Mitch, who's literally being hung around here to boost somebody up

items.claim: Chase Hooper has a superior ground game compared to Mitch Ramirez.
items.quote: I do honestly feel like the ground game is just going to be too much for Ramirez.

items.claim: Fatima Klein is a minus 500 favorite primarily because she was originally scheduled to fight Amanda Hebas.
items.quote: I'm assuming the minus 500 is largely because Fatima Klein was supposed to fight Amanda Hebus.

items.claim: Tabitha Richi is a BJJ black belt who possesses competent striking skills.
items.quote: Reachi's legit like she's a BJJ black belt and she can strike a little bit.

items.claim: Tabitha Richi's previous losses have all been against high-level, ranked, or title-contending opponents.
items.quote: it's not like she's losing to girls that aren't ranked in the division. It's not like she's losing to girls that haven't fought for a UFC title before.

items.claim: Tabitha Richi is physically undersized compared to her opponents in the division.
items.quote: she's 5'1. Even against girls that are only 5'3, 5'4, like everybody just seems to have a lot of size on her.
